cards.name: Gosalyn Mallard - The Quiverwing Quack
cards.cardText:
HEROIC INTERVENTION When you play this character, you may ready chosen character with cost 2 or less. If you do, they can't quest or challenge for the rest of this turn.

"I bet Dad never caught any flowers like this!"

cards.name: Monterey Jack - Watchful Ranger
cards.cardText:
BIRD'S-EYE VIEW When you play this character, you may reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a character card, you may put it into your hand. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

"They're not lost. I just haven't found 'em yet!"

cards.name: Woody - Waiting for a Friend
cards.cardText:
"Starin' over the jungle from this huge vine
I think back to when I was laughin' and feelin' fine
My friends were all around to welcome me back home
But now I'm lost in Lorcana and oh so alone"

cards.name: Dale - Excited Friend
cards.cardText:
LOOK WHAT I FOUND While you have a character named Chip in play, this character gets +1 {L}.

"Hey, Chip! Look what I found! Maybe we can use 'em for something."

cards.name: Pedro Madrigal - Family Patriarch
cards.cardText:
DIFFICULT JOURNEY This character enters play with 1 damage.
DEVOTED FAMILY When you play this character, if you have another Madrigal character in play, you may remove up to 1 damage from him.

cards.name: Agustin Madrigal - Exceptionally Kind
cards.cardText:
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)

"I'm happy to bring these arepas to the oasis, mi vida. Just think how much more I could help if I had a gift."

cards.name: Alan-a-Dale - Loyal Bard
cards.cardText:
Singer 4 (This character counts as cost 4 to sing songs.)

"When the vine was loomin' large
And had us all feelin' down
Ol' Martin stood up, took charge
And now we're Illuminary bound"

cards.name: Prince Eric - Noble Swordsman
cards.cardText: Of all the items in Ariel's trove, something about this particular sword called to him. He knew it was meant to be his.

cards.name: Dolores Madrigal - Hears Everything
cards.cardText:
NO SECRETS When you play this character, look at chosen opponent's hand.

"Amazu says he'll be back this way in a few weeks. He's stuck in the desert right now."

cards.name: Rex - Protective Dinosaur
cards.cardText:
Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
RUN AWAY! During an opponent's turn, when this character is banished, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Hamm - Piggy Bank
cards.cardText:
LOOSE CHANGE {E} — You pay 1 {I} less for the next character you play this turn.

"Can you hurry up, Woody? I think these flowers are aiming to break the bank, if you know what I mean!"

cards.name: Monterey Jack - Hypnotized by Cheese
cards.cardText:
BREAK THE TRANCE This character can't quest unless you have a character with 4 {W} or more in play.

"When there's a hint of cheddar in the air, somethin' inside me snaps."

cards.name: Bo Peep - Caring Shepherd
cards.cardText: SOMEBODY DO SOMETHING! Your characters named Woody gain Bodyguard. (An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

cards.name: Chip - Retrieval Expert
cards.cardText:
THERE YOU ARE! When you play this character, you may return a character card with 4 {W} or more from your discard to your hand.
FRIENDLY ASSIST Your characters named Dale get +1 {W}.

cards.name: Woody - Jungle Guide
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Woody.)
LET'S GET MOVIN' Whenever this character quests, draw a card. Then, you may play a character with cost 2 or less for free.
EVERYONE GATHER 'ROUND Your other Toy characters get +1 {W}.

cards.name: Isabela Madrigal - Such a Lovely Voice
cards.cardText:
Singer 5 (This character counts as cost 5 to sing songs.)
NEW MOTIF When you play this character, if you removed 1 or more damage from one of your characters this turn, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Bullseye - Loyal Horse
cards.cardText:
LET'S RIDE If you have a character named Woody or Jessie in play, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.

"Whoo-whee, Bullseye! You're muddier than a pig at suppertime! Now come on outta there."
—Jessie

cards.name: Ariel - Curious Traveler
cards.cardText:
FAMILIAR GROUND Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen opposing character can't challenge and must quest during their next turn if able.

"Isn't it wonderful? See if there's anything that catches your eye."

cards.name: Isabela Madrigal - Caring Cultivator
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Isabela Madrigal.)
DO NO WRONG Whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, gain 1 lore for each 1 damage removed.

cards.name: Jessie - Lively Cowgirl
cards.cardText:
PART OF A FAMILY Whenever this character quests, if you have 2 or more other Toy characters in play, you may draw a card.
YODEL-AY-HEE-HOO! Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a card, chosen opposing character gets -1 {S} until the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Woody - Leader of the Toys
cards.cardText: LET'S GO HOME When you play this character, look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Toy character card or a location card named Andy's Room and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: Dale - Ready for His Shot
cards.cardText:
SPIKE SUIT During challenges, your characters deal damage with their {W} instead of their {S}.

"He's bonkus in the conkus, you know."
—Monterey Jack

cards.name: The Prince - Searching for His Love
cards.cardText: "Forest deep and highest mountain are nothing to a true heart. I hear my love's voice in every bird's song and see her beauty in the golden light."

cards.name: Julieta Madrigal - Caring Baker
cards.cardText:
RESTORING RECIPE When you play this character and whenever she quests, you may remove up to 1 damage from chosen character or location.

"Mi amor, your kind heart is the best gift I've ever received."

cards.name: Pluto - Vigilant Traveler
cards.cardText:
BEWARE OF DOG Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen opposing character gets -1 {S} until the start of your next turn.

"What'd you hear, boy?"
—Mickey

cards.name: Mickey Mouse - Expedition Leader
cards.cardText:
LONG JOURNEY This character may enter play exerted.
SECRET PATH While this character is exerted, whenever one of your other characters quests, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} until the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Chip - Team Player
cards.cardText:
RANGER RESOURCEFULNESS When you play this character, if you have another character with 4 {W} or more in play, you may draw a card.

"Come on, Dale. You look fine! I've got a plan that you'll be perfect for!"

cards.name: Ranger Team-Up
cards.cardText:
Chosen character gets +{S} equal to their {W} this turn.

"Great teamwork, pal! Now, make sure that helmet is fastened nice and tight . . ."
—Chip

cards.name: This Growing Pressure
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 
Chosen opposing character can't challenge and must quest during their next turn if able. Draw a card.

cards.name: You've Got a Friend in Me
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 
Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 2 Toy character cards and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: Metamorphosis
cards.cardText:
Shift a character from your discard for free.

"The vine is full of flood ink. You won't believe what it can do with a little encouragement!"
—Isabela Madrigal

cards.name: When You Need Help, Just Call
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 
If an opponent has more characters in play than you, you may play a character with cost 4 or less for free.

cards.name: Safety Rope
cards.cardText:
GRAB HOLD! When you play this item, you may put a character card from your discard on the top of your deck.
PACK IT UP At the end of your turn, you may banish this item to draw a card.

cards.name: Andy's Room - Home Base
cards.cardText: ANDY'S FAVORITE While you have only 1 character here, they get +2 {W} and +1 {L}.

cards.name: Mor'du - Wicked with Pride
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

"Believing that he alone should be the sole heir, a seed of selfishness grew in him like a poison."
—The Witch

cards.name: Alma Madrigal - Leading the Way
cards.cardText:
PROTECTING THE FAMILY When you play this character, if you have another Madrigal character in play, you may exert chosen opposing character.

"In our darkest moment, we were given a miracle."

cards.name: Snow White - Merry as the Morning
cards.cardText:
CLARION CALL Whenever this character quests, you may return chosen Seven Dwarfs character of yours to your hand to draw a card.
NEVER FORGOTTEN During an opponent's turn, when this character is banished in a challenge, return this card to your hand.

cards.name: Dopey - Drawn to Music
cards.cardText:
TONGUE-TIED This character can't {E} to sing songs.
DISTANT MELODY Once during your turn, whenever you play a song, this character gets +1 {L} this turn.

cards.name: Bashful - Riding the Rails
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

"Oh, gosh!"

cards.name: Doc - Taking Notes
cards.cardText:
SHARE KNOWLEDGE When you play this character, if you have another Seven Dwarfs character or a Princess character in play, draw a card.

"Oh boy! Now this is a change grant . . . uh, a ranged pant . . . a strange plant!"

cards.name: Grumpy - Soreheaded Miner
cards.cardText: "Watch what yer doin'. Ya nearly put me through a wall with that sneeze! Ya wanna bring the whole mine down?!"

cards.name: Sneezy - Startlingly Loud
cards.cardText:
GESUNDHEIT When you play this character, chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.

"Why did the vine have to have such big flo—ah-AH-CHOO!"

cards.name: Happy - Joyful Adventurer
cards.cardText: "This vine looks mighty peculiar! You fellas think it'd be okay to touch it?"

cards.name: Sleepy - Deep Sleeper
cards.cardText:
PLEASANT DREAMS When this character is banished, if you have a Seven Dwarfs or Princess character in play, you may draw a card.

A warm breeze, fragrant smells, and a gently swinging vine... Who wouldn't fall asleep?

cards.name: Alma Madrigal - Heart of the Family
cards.cardText:
FIND A WAY Whenever this character quests, move up to 1 damage from chosen character of yours to chosen opposing character.

"Everybody makes mistakes. What's important is that we recognize them."

cards.name: Frozone - Super Slick
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

"Go on. You can say it. That was cool, right?"

cards.name: Will o' the Wisp - Forest Spirit
cards.cardText:
COME ON OUT When this character is banished in a challenge, you may return this card to your hand.

They always come back when you need them.

cards.name: Violet Parr - Learning New Powers
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
DEFLECT When you play this character, you may move 1 damage from chosen character to chosen opposing character.

cards.name: Mrs. Incredible - Super Stretchy
cards.cardText:
FLEXIBLE THINKING At the start of your turn, you may choose one:
• This character gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
• This character gets +1 {L} this turn.

cards.name: Hamish, Hubert & Harris - Making Mischief
cards.cardText:
STAY QUIET This character may enter play exerted.
CLEVER TRAP At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, chosen opposing character can't ready at the start of their next turn.

cards.name: Elinor - Bespelled Queen
cards.cardText:
Challenger +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {S}.)

She had a lot to learn about being a bear, but protecting her family came naturally.

cards.name: Mickey Mouse - Experienced Traveler
cards.cardText:
LIGHTING THE WAY Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may draw a card.

You're never lost when you have a friend by your side.

cards.name: Mirage - Super Recruiter
cards.cardText:
BUSINESS ARRANGEMENT When you play this character, if you have a Super or Hero character in play, you may draw a card.

"The Supers aren't gone, Mr. Incredible. You're still here. You can still do great things."

cards.name: Edna Mode - Fashion Designer
cards.cardText:
NO CAPES! When you play this character, you may return chosen item with cost 2 or less to its player's hand. If you do, its player draws a card.
MAKING SUPERS FABULOUS Whenever this character quests, your Super characters get +1 {L} this turn.

cards.name: Maleficent - Imperious Traveler
cards.cardText:
HEED MY WORDS Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may exert chosen opposing character.

"Bind this glimmer, fiendish flowers!"

cards.name: Pepa Madrigal - Calm Before the Storm
cards.cardText:
STORMY WEATHER When you play this character, deal 1 damage to each of your other characters.
SILVER LINING Once during your turn, whenever you remove 1 or more damage from one of your characters, draw a card.

cards.name: Mor'du - Savage Cursed Prince
cards.cardText:
FEROCIOUS ROAR When you play this character, exert all your characters not named Mor'du.
ROOTED BY FEAR Your characters not named Mor'du can't ready at the start of your turn.

cards.name: Alma Madrigal - Keeper of the Flame
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Alma Madrigal.)
THAT'S ENOUGH Whenever you remove 1 or more damage from one of your characters, you may exert chosen opposing character.

cards.name: Frozone - Super Cool
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
JUST CHILL When you play this character, if you have another Super character in play, you may exert chosen opposing character.

cards.name: Luisa Madrigal - Confident Climber
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Luisa Madrigal.)
I CAN TAKE IT 1 {I} — Move up to 1 damage from chosen character of yours to this character. Then, if this character has 3 or more damage, move all damage from this character to chosen opposing character.

cards.name: Dash Parr - Lava Runner
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)
RECORD TIME This character can quest the turn he's played.

"Whoa! A hidden place inside the mountain!"

cards.name: Luisa Madrigal - Pushing Through
cards.cardText:
Challenger +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {S}.)

"One way... or another... I'm getting... all of you... up... this mountain!"

cards.name: Super Relocation Program
cards.cardText:
Return chosen character of yours to your hand. If you returned a Hero character this way, draw 2 cards.

"We appreciate what you did in the old days, but those days are over."
—Rick Dicker

cards.name: Right Behind You
cards.cardText: Draw a card. If you have a Seven Dwarfs character and a Princess character in play, you may play a Seven Dwarfs character for free.

cards.name: Don't Be Nervous
cards.cardText: Search your deck for a Princess character card, reveal that card to all players, and put it into your hand. Then, shuffle your deck. If you have 2 or more Seven Dwarfs characters in play, draw 2 cards and gain 2 lore.

cards.name: Super Suit
cards.cardText:
SIMPLE, ELEGANT When you play this item, if you have a Hero character in play, gain 1 lore.
SUIT UP {E}, 2 {I} — If you played a Hero character this turn, draw a card.

cards.name: DunBroch Family Tapestry
cards.cardText:
TORN APART This item enters play exerted.
MEND THE BOND {E}, Banish this item — Each player shuffles all character cards from their discard into their deck.

cards.name: Ring of Stones - Place of Legends
cards.cardText:
FOLLOW YOUR FATE Your exerted characters can move here for free.
PART THE VEIL Once during your turn, whenever a character moves here, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Merida - Defiant Daughter
cards.cardText:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

"'Stay in camp, Merida.' 'Be an example, Merida.' What could it hurt to go out and explore? I'll stay on the vine and they'll never even know."

cards.name: Hamish, Hubert & Harris - Troublemaking Triplets
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

"Oh, aye, they're slippery little devils. Ye should see what they did to the garden."
—Merida

cards.name: Young MacGuffin - Soft-Spoken Son
cards.cardText: "There's something wrong with these flowers, Da. They make me feel funny, like I dinnae want to fight them."

cards.name: Tod - Nimble Fox
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

"Look, I counted to ten before I started climbing. You all should have found better hiding spots than the top of a tree."

cards.name: Helga Sinclair - No Backup Needed
cards.cardText:
CRISIS MANAGEMENT If 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you pay 2 {I} less to play this character.

"Once again, I find myself cleaning up someone else's mess."

cards.name: The Witch - Wily Woodcarver
cards.cardText:
UNSATISFIED CUSTOMERS Whenever this character is challenged, each opponent loses 1 lore.

"This is the perfect place to set up shop! That vine adds just the right rustic feel."

cards.name: The Queen - Evil Ruler
cards.cardText:
UNEQUALED CRUELTY While an opposing damaged character is in play, this character gets +2 {S}.

"With such a gift to further the Council's goals, soon all will tremble before my power."

cards.name: Buzz Lightyear - Space Ranger
cards.cardText: "Environment appears habitable, but the flora seems to have undergone some strange mutations. Could be Zurg's influence."

cards.name: RC - Remote-Controlled Car
cards.cardText:
LOW BATTERIES This character can't quest or challenge unless you pay 1 {I}. (You pay this cost each time.)

Racing around Andy's room is fun, but he really loves going off road.

cards.name: Lord MacGuffin - Clever Swordsman
cards.cardText:
WAIT FOR IT... This character may enter play exerted to deal 3 damage to chosen damaged character.

"We'll find our way back to the Illuminary if we have to fight through every plant in Lorcana."

cards.name: Lenny - Toy Binoculars
cards.cardText:
TAKE A GOOD LOOK When you play this character, chosen opponent reveals their hand and discards an action card of your choice.
COMIN' UP FAST Once during your turn, whenever you play an action, you may ready this character.

cards.name: Gaetan Moliere - Clever Burrower
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
UNEARTH Whenever this character quests, you may draw 2 cards, then choose and discard 2 cards.

cards.name: Peter Pan - Searching Far and Wide
cards.cardText: "I've already checked the whole jungle. He's got to be around here somewhere!"

cards.name: Milo Thatch - Getting His Hands Dirty
cards.cardText:
Ward
SCHOLAR'S GAMBIT When you play this character, you may choose and discard a card to return chosen character to their player's hand.
PRACTICAL KNOWLEDGE At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, draw a card.

cards.name: Alien - True Believer
cards.cardText:
WE ARE ONE This character gets +1 {S} for each other Toy character you have in play.
HE HAS BEEN CHOSEN During your turn, when this character is banished, return another character card named Alien from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Donald Duck - Distracted Traveler
cards.cardText:
BURNING CURIOSITY Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, each opponent chooses and discards a card.

In the wilderness of Lorcana, a little luck goes a long way.

cards.name: Buzz Lightyear - On the Way
cards.cardText:
SECRET MISSION Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a non-character, draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
WORLD'S GREATEST TOY Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a character, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing damaged character.

cards.name: Elinor - Renowned Diplomat
cards.cardText: COORDINATED EFFORTS At the end of your turn, if you have 3 or more exerted characters in play, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing character, gain 1 lore, and draw a card.

cards.name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke - Adventurer for Hire
cards.cardText:
EYE FOR VALUE When you play this character, you may draw a card, then choose and discard a card.
DIRTY TRICKS At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, each opponent loses 1 lore.

cards.name: Joshua Sweet - Field Surgeon
cards.cardText:
NO PATIENCE Whenever this character is challenged, chosen opponent chooses and discards a card.

"It's barely a scratch! Get some rest and you'll be fine. No arguing—doctor's orders."

cards.name: Merida - Gifted Archer
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Merida.)
FIERCE PROTECTION While this character is exerted, whenever an opposing character challenges, you may deal 1 damage to the challenging character.

cards.name: The Queen - Devious Disguise
cards.cardText:
EVIL SCHEME When you play this character, you may draw a card. If you do, each opponent gains 2 lore.
JEALOUS HEART While an opponent has more lore than you, this character gets +2 {L}.

cards.name: Buzz Lightyear - Jungle Ranger
cards.cardText:
Shift 5 {I} (You may pay 5 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Buzz Lightyear.)
TAKE CHARGE When you play this character, you may return an action card with cost 7 or less from your discard to your hand.
ADVANCED TRAINING Whenever you play an action, chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.

cards.name: Cruella De Vil - Judgmental Traveler
cards.cardText:
YOU'RE OUT OF FASHION Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may banish chosen damaged character.

"Can I help you? Not with your sense of style, darling."

cards.name: Helga Sinclair - Prepared for Anything
cards.cardText:
COMBAT TRAINING Whenever this character quests, deal 1 damage to chosen opposing character. If 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, deal 2 damage instead.

She'll take on anything for the right price.

cards.name: The Huntsman - On the Queen's Orders
cards.cardText:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

"Even you wouldn't be fool enough to disobey my orders a second time."
—The Queen

cards.name: Strange Things
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 4 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 
Up to 2 chosen characters can't quest until the start of your next turn. Draw a card.

cards.name: Sabotage
cards.cardText:
Banish chosen item or location and all other items or locations with the same name.

"Ha! That worked even better than last time."

cards.name: The Family Scattered
cards.cardText: Chosen opponent chooses 3 of their characters and returns one of those cards to their hand, puts one on the bottom of their deck, and puts one on the top of their deck.

cards.name: Buzz's Arm
cards.cardText:
MISSING PIECE If a character named Buzz Lightyear was banished this turn, you may play this item for free.
SOME ASSEMBLY REQUIRED {E} — You pay 1 {I} less for the next action or item you play this turn.

cards.name: The Claw
cards.cardText:
THE CLAW CHOOSES {E}, 2 {I}, Banish one of your characters — Return chosen opposing character to their player's hand.

"Trust in the Claw. It shall lift us from this terrible place!" 
—Alien

cards.name: Gyro-Evac
cards.cardText:
TAKE HER UP {E}, 1 {I} — Chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)
CRASH LANDING {E}, Banish this item — Each player loses 2 lore.

cards.name: Merida's Bow
cards.cardText:
EASY SHOT When you play this item, deal 1 damage to chosen character.
FINAL ARROW 1 {I}, Banish this item — Deal 1 damage to chosen character.

cards.name: Pizza Planet - Spaceport
cards.cardText:
YOU ARE CLEAR TO ENTER Your Toy characters can move here for free.
HEAVILY GUARDED Whenever a character is challenged while here, each opponent loses 1 lore.

cards.name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke - Crystallized Commander
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Lyle Tiberius Rourke.)
PLAN'S CHANGED When you play this character, put the top 2 cards of your deck into your discard. Then, you may return an action card with cost 4 or less from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Mr. Incredible - Bob Parr
cards.cardText: Dropping weight and getting in shape!

cards.name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke - Looking for His Moment
cards.cardText: "You have to be ready to take advantage of any opportunity. And this vine? Looks like a pretty big opportunity."

cards.name: Pegasus - Searching High and Low
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)

Lorcana had changed. It felt bigger somehow. But no matter how big it got, he was determined to find his friend.

cards.name: Audrey Ramirez - Gutsy Mechanic
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

"I love a machine that gets me in the action even faster!"

cards.name: Milo Thatch - Courageous Explorer
cards.cardText:
FASCINATING DISCOVERY During your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, this character gets +1 {L}.

"Just think, Amazu—without the vine, we might never have discovered these ruins!"

cards.name: Zeus - Defiant God
cards.cardText:
IMMORTAL WOUND This character enters play with 4 damage.

"I am the ruler of Olympus! I refuse to be defeated by a bunch of flowers!"

cards.name: Preston Whitmore - Expedition Financier
cards.cardText:
PRICE OF PROGRESS When you play this character, you may put the top 2 cards of your deck into your discard.

"I promised all of you I'd keep your secrets. And Preston Whitmore always keeps a promise."

cards.name: Jingle Joe - Sid's Toy
cards.cardText: TURN OUT THE LIGHT During your turn, whenever one of your other Toy characters is banished, chosen character of yours gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

cards.name: Wind-Up Frog - Sid's Toy
cards.cardText:
ADDED TRACTION If one of your Toy characters was banished this turn, you pay 2 {I} less to play this character.

"I made it cooler. Who cares about some dumb hopping frog, when it can have wheels?"
—Sid

cards.name: Roller Bob - Sid's Toy
cards.cardText: TIME TO MOVE When you play this character, you may put 2 character cards from your discard on the bottom of your deck to give this character Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

cards.name: Hand-in-the-Box - Sid's Toy
cards.cardText:
SPRING-LOADED You may put a Toy character card from your discard on the bottom of your deck to play this character for free.

"Ah! How does that still startle me every time?"
—Woody

cards.name: Daisy Duck - Trendy Traveler
cards.cardText:
BREAK IS OVER Whenever this character quests, if you played a character this turn, you may ready another chosen character. If you do, they can't quest for the rest of this turn.

"Time to go. I don't want to miss that sunset!"

cards.name: Copper - Big Dog
cards.cardText: "I'll clear this ol' vine out, if I have to do it one root at a time."

cards.name: Jebidiah Farnsworth - Cookie
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
Reckless (This character can't quest and must challenge each turn if able.)

"Anything's edible if ya fry it!"

cards.name: Dash Parr - Super Speedy
cards.cardText:
Rush (This character can challenge the turn they're played.)

"You can't outrun your chores, young man!"
—Helen Parr

cards.name: Babyhead - Leader of Sid's Toys
cards.cardText:
TIGHTEN THE BOLTS Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a card, chosen character gets +2 {S} this turn.
REPLACEMENT PARTS During your turn, whenever one of your other characters is banished, draw a card.

cards.name: Bouncing Ducky - Sid's Toy
cards.cardText:
REJECTED TOYS For each Toy character card in your discard, you pay 1 {I} less to play this character.
REPURPOSED When you play this character, put all Toy character cards from your discard on the bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: Jack-Jack Parr - Incredible Potential
cards.cardText:
WEIRD THINGS ARE HAPPENING At the start of your turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your discard. If its card type is:
• character, this character gets +2 {S} this turn.
• action or item, this character gets +2 {L} this turn.
• location, banish chosen character.

cards.name: Queen of Hearts - Impatient Traveler
cards.cardText:
ROYAL COMMAND Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, chosen character gains Rush this turn. (They can challenge the turn they're played.)

Hours of walking in the heat had not improved her rosy disposition.

cards.name: Hercules - Young Rescuer
cards.cardText:
HEROIC SACRIFICE When you play this character, you may discard your hand. If you do, return a card from your discard to your hand.

"I don't care what the Fates say. I make my own destiny."

cards.name: Vincenzo Santorini - On the Run
cards.cardText:
Evasive (Only characters with Evasive can challenge this character.)
NEUTRALIZE Opposing items can't ready at the start of their players' turns.

cards.name: The Leviathan - Guardian of Atlantis
cards.cardText: IT'S A MACHINE! When you play this character, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may banish any number of chosen opposing characters with total {S} 10 or less.

cards.name: Sid Phillips - Toy Surgeon
cards.cardText:
PLAYTIME'S OVER When you play this character, you may banish another chosen character of yours. If you do, each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.
DOUBLE PRIZES! During your turn, whenever a Toy character is banished, gain 2 lore.

cards.name: Mr. Incredible - Super Strong
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Mr. Incredible.)
ALWAYS UNITED This character gets +2 {S} for each other character you have in play.
LET'S DO THIS! Whenever one of your Super characters challenges another character, draw a card.

cards.name: Pterodactyl Janie Doll - Sid's Toy
cards.cardText:
DOUBLE TRANSPLANT During your turn, when this character is banished, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore.

"The first step of her transformation is complete."
—Sid

cards.name: Inner Strength
cards.cardText:
Chosen character gets +1 {S} this turn. Draw a card.

Just when you think you've given it all you've got, sometimes you can give a little more.

cards.name: Firefly Swarm
cards.cardText:
Choose one:
• Banish chosen character with 2 {S} or less.
• If 2 or more other cards were put into your discard this turn, banish chosen character.

cards.name: Like A Bird In the Sky
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 
Chosen character gets +1 {L} and gains Evasive until the start of your next turn. (Only characters with Evasive can challenge them.)

cards.name: Hero Work
cards.cardText:
Your characters get +1 {S} this turn. Your Hero characters gain "Whenever this character challenges another character, each opponent loses 1 lore and you gain 1 lore" this turn.

"It's a whole family of Supers!" 
—Syndrome

cards.name: Dangerous Plan
cards.cardText:
Draw 2 cards. Then, discard a card at random.

Audrey: "This was your plan?!"
Milo: "I didn't anticipate the flowers, but it can still work!"

cards.name: Amazu's Inkcaster
cards.cardText:
ON THE HORIZON {E}, 1 {I} — Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal a location card and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

"It always points the way to new adventures."
—Amazu, an Illumineer

cards.name: Remote Inklands - Desert Ruins
cards.cardText:
ERODING WINDS At the start of your turn, put the top card of your deck into your discard.
SUCCESSFUL EXPEDITION Characters get +2 {S} while here.

cards.name: Leviathan's Lair - Dangerous Ground
cards.cardText:
LOST TO THE DUNES When this location is banished, each opponent chooses and banishes one of their characters.

Enter the lair of the leviathan.

cards.name: Robin Hood - Desert Wanderer
cards.cardText: "I say, those glowing symbols look interesting. I think it's time to go in for a closer look!"

cards.name: Prince Charming - Searching for Answers
cards.cardText: From a distance this had looked like any other cave. But up close . . .

cards.name: Merryweather - Feisty Fairy
cards.cardText:
Ward (Opponents can't choose this character except to challenge.)

"We'll need a fire! A nice blue fire, of course."

cards.name: Fauna - Good-Natured Fairy
cards.cardText:
Support (Whenever this character quests, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)

"Oh dear, let me help you with that."

cards.name: Flora - Strong-Willed Fairy
cards.cardText:
LUMINOUS SHELTER When you play this character, your other characters gain Resist +1 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

"While you two finish up, I'll add protective charms. Pink, of course."

cards.name: Mirabel Madrigal - Resourceful Daughter
cards.cardText:
THIS WILL HELP When you play this character, remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.

"We'll get you something to eat when we get to camp. For now, you should drink this."

cards.name: Syndrome - Evil Inventor
cards.cardText:
Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

The fifth Rule of Villainy: The best way to get revenge on your enemies? Lots of practice.

cards.name: Kida - Guardian of the Path
cards.cardText:
NATURAL DEFENSE When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.

"I may be far from home, but I still know how to snare an intruder."
—Kida

cards.name: Gadget Hackwrench - Resourceful Mechanic
cards.cardText:
TIME TO TINKER When you play this character, you may play an item with cost 3 or less for free.
WELL SUPPLIED Your characters with Support get +1 {L}.

cards.name: Norton Nimnul - Misanthropic Genius
cards.cardText:
DEVITALIZER RAY Once during your turn, whenever you play an item, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.

"Another successful test! This brilliant devitalizer ray technology will be my finest invention yet!"

cards.name: Gadget Hackwrench - Finder of Lost Parts
cards.cardText:
USEFUL BITS When this character leaves play, you may return an item card from your discard to your hand.

"Golly, I can't believe I almost left the safety pin behind. It's the key to everything!"

cards.name: Zipper - Tiny Helper
cards.cardText:
"Crikey! I've seen fellas who are twice the size with half the heart as that wee dodger!"
—Monterey Jack

cards.name: Edna Mode - Super Suit Designer
cards.cardText:
KEY ACCESSORY {E} — Ready chosen item.
ALL THE BASICS While you have an item named Super Suit in play, this character gains Ward. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

cards.name: Zipper - Big Helper
cards.cardText:
Shift 2 {I} (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Zipper.)
BUZZING ENTHUSIASM Whenever this character quests, you may add his {W} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.

cards.name: Luisa Madrigal - No Pressure
cards.cardText:
SHOULDER THE BURDEN Whenever this character quests, you may move up to 3 damage from chosen character to this character.

"Who needs a break? I'm fine! I got this!"

cards.name: Dr. Sara Bellum - Head of Research
cards.cardText:
SCIENTIFIC SCRUTINY When you play this character, look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of your deck.

"Fascinating. What unusual markings! I can't wait to bring my findings back to S.H.U.S.H."

cards.name: Isabela Madrigal - Perfectly in Control
cards.cardText:
FEEL BETTER When you play this character and whenever she quests, you may move all damage from chosen character of yours to this character.
SELF-CARE At the end of your turn, you may remove all damage from this character.

cards.name: Bruno Madrigal - Oasis Oracle
cards.cardText:
FIND THAT VISION Once during your turn, whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.
YOU'LL BE OKAY Whenever this character quests, you may remove all damage from chosen character.

cards.name: Cinderella - Resourceful Traveler
cards.cardText:
THIS AND THAT Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

No matter how difficult the journey, she always takes care of her friends.

cards.name: Bruno Madrigal - Seeing the Future
cards.cardText:
CHANGE THE OUTCOME When you play this character, you may look at the top card of chosen player's deck. Put it on either the top or the bottom of their deck.

"It's so hard to make out . . . I think it's something buried deep underground."

cards.name: Kida - Discovering the Unknown
cards.cardText: READ THE RUNES Whenever this character quests, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

cards.name: Kashekim - Wise King
cards.cardText:
STRENGTH IN MEMORY At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your inkwell facedown.

"The power here is buried deep in the sands."

cards.name: Minnie Mouse - Practical Traveler
cards.cardText:
DISCERNING EYE Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, gain 1 lore.

"I found a shortcut just over the ridge. We'll be at the oasis in no time!"

cards.name: Kida - Crystal Scion
Ursula - Deal Maker
cards.cardText:
QUITE THE BARGAIN When you play this character and whenever she quests, another chosen character gets +1 {L} this turn.
BY THE WAY At the end of your turn, if this character is exerted, put chosen character of yours into your inkwell facedown and exerted.

cards.name: Someone Will Lose His Head
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 3 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.) 
Each opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.

cards.name: What Else Can I Do?
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 5 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other into your inkwell facedown and exerted. If a character sang this song, your characters gain Ward until the start of your next turn. (Opponents can't choose them except to challenge.)

cards.name: Escape Plan
cards.cardText:
You can't play this action unless 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn.
Each player chooses 2 of their characters and puts them into their inkwell facedown and exerted.

cards.name: Salvage Operation
cards.cardText:
Return an item card from your discard to your hand. If you have a character with 4 {W} or more in play, gain 1 lore.

"Can you lift the Ranger Plane up a little higher, Zipper? I've just about got it."
—Gadget Hackwrench

cards.name: Julieta's Arepas
cards.cardText:
FLAVORFUL CURE At the start of your turn, if you have a Madrigal character in play, remove up to 2 damage from chosen character.
THAT DID THE TRICK {E} — If you removed damage from a character this turn, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Ranger Plane
cards.cardText:
AIR SUPPORT Your characters gain Support. (Whenever they quest, you may add their {S} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.)
BIG LIFT {E} — Chosen character with 10 {S} or more gets +3 {L} this turn.

cards.name: Gadget's Goggles
cards.cardText:
ENHANCED VISION {E}, 1 {I} — Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one on the top of your deck and the other on the bottom.

Dale: "Do you see anything, Gadget?"
Gadget: "Yeah, but I wish I didn't."

cards.name: Shepherd's Journal
cards.cardText:
MARGIN NOTES When you play this item, you may look at the top card of your deck. Put it on either the top of your deck or into your discard.
KEY TO THE PUZZLE 1 {I}, Banish this item — Return another item card from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Casa Madrigal - Courtyard
cards.cardText: HEALING HOME Whenever a character quests while here, you may remove up to 2 damage from them. Then, you may remove up to 2 damage from this location.

cards.name: Pocahontas - Steadfast Traveler
cards.cardText:
WANDERING SPIRIT Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, return a location card from your discard to your hand.

"Sometimes the right path is not the easiest one."
—Grandmother Willow

cards.name: Syndrome - Out for Revenge
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Syndrome.)
GOT ME MONOLOGUING! Whenever this character quests, return a Robot character card from your discard to your hand. Then, you may play or shift a Robot character with cost 8 or less for free.

cards.name: Omnidroid - V.8
cards.cardText:
"It's bigger! It's badder! Ladies and gentlemen, it's too much for Mr. Incredible!"
—Syndrome

cards.name: Angus - Mighty Horse
cards.cardText: DAUNTLESS When you play this character, chosen character gains Alert this turn. (They can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

cards.name: Fergus - King of DunBroch
cards.cardText:
Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)

"Come on then! I'll take ye all on at once!"

cards.name: Wee Dingwall - Scrappy Lad
cards.cardText:
Challenger +2 (While challenging, this character gets +2 {S}.)

"No big flower's gonnae block our way, Da. I'll tear it apart with me own hands."

cards.name: Incrediboy - Buddy Pine
cards.cardText:
NERDING OUT When you play this character, if a Hero character is in play, gain 1 lore.
SPOILER ALERT This character also counts as being named Syndrome for Shift.

"Not every superhero has powers, you know."

cards.name: Violet Parr - At Wits' End
cards.cardText:
Alert (This character can challenge as if they had Evasive.)

"Keep laughing, Dash. It's time to play 'Bowling for Brothers.'"
—Violet

cards.name: Mrs. Incredible - Helen Parr
cards.cardText:
PEP TALK When you play this character, chosen character gains Challenger +2 this turn. (They get +2 {S} while challenging.)

"You can do this. I believe in you. Now let's show them what we can do!"

cards.name: Young Macintosh - Proud Son
cards.cardText: "We've got the strength and we've got the swords. What vine could stand against all of that, right Da?"

cards.name: Lord Macintosh - Wiry and High-Strung
cards.cardText:
TOUGH IT OUT This character may enter play exerted to give chosen character Resist +2 until the start of your next turn. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

"Clan Macintosh fears no flower, vine, or tree. We dinnae mess with shrubs, though."

cards.name: Fat Cat - Felonious Feline
cards.cardText:
Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

"I'm afraid your information is out of date, my dear rodent. I know what the glyphs are for, and more importantly . . . how to use them."

cards.name: Rat Capone - Rodent Gangster
cards.cardText:
SHADAAP! While this character has no damage, he gets +3 {S}.

"Listen here, you no good, dirty cat. We had a deal! Yeah, a deal, see? And you gotta honor it!"

cards.name: Omnidroid - V.9
cards.cardText:
Shift 2 {I} (You may pay 2 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Omnidroid.)
ENEMY DETECTED When you play this character, if you used Shift to play it, you may deal 2 damage to chosen character.

cards.name: Mr. Incredible - Taking Out the Trash
cards.cardText:
KA-POW! When you play this character, you may deal 2 damage to chosen opposing Robot or Villain character.

"Heavyweight problems need heavyweight solutions."
—Mr. Incredible

cards.name: Lord Dingwall - Bullheaded
cards.cardText:
FIGHTIN' TALK This character may enter play exerted to give chosen character Challenger +3 this turn. (They get +3 {S} while challenging.)

"Ach, look at the size o' that flower! Let's clear that beastie out before it causes any trouble."

cards.name: Fat Cat - Criminal Businessman
cards.cardText:
WORTHY INVESTMENT Your locations gain Resist +1. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 1.)

"You don't become the most wanted cat in the realm by playing nice."

cards.name: Maudie - Exasperated Nursemaid
cards.cardText:
Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)

"I'm here to look after three bairns, not three bears!"

cards.name: Goofy - Determined Traveler
cards.cardText:
FALLING ROCKS Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, you may deal 1 damage to chosen character or location.

"Gawrsh! Look out below!"

cards.name: Omnidroid - V.10
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Omnidroid.)
ELECTRO-ARMOR While there's a card under this character, it gains Resist +2. (Damage dealt to them is reduced by 2.)

cards.name: Merida - Formidable Archer
cards.cardText:
FULL QUIVER When you play this character, you may return an action card named Three Arrows from your discard to your hand.
STEADY AIM Whenever one of your actions deals damage to an opposing character, deal 2 damage to that character.

cards.name: John Smith - Skillful Explorer
cards.cardText: "Look alive, men. There's plenty of fish in this river!"

cards.name: Gizmoduck - Duckburg Defender
cards.cardText:
Resist +1 (Damage dealt to this character is reduced by 1.)
FAIL-SAFE While you have no cards in your hand, opponents can't play actions with cost 4 or more.

cards.name: Fergus - Outpost Builder
cards.cardText:
JUST THE SPOT During your turn, whenever this character becomes exerted, you may play a location from your hand or discard with cost 4 or less for free.
HOLD FAST While this character is at a location, whenever a location is challenged and banished, you may deal 4 damage to chosen character.

cards.name: Mrs. Incredible - Determined Rescuer
Diablo - Stone Servant
cards.cardText:
CRUEL INTENT While you have a Villain character in play, this character gets +2 {S} and +1 {L}.
VILLAINOUS BOND While this character is exerted, your Villain characters can't be challenged.

cards.name: Three Arrows
cards.cardText:
Deal 2 damage to chosen character. Then, you may deal 1 damage to another chosen character.

"I am Merida. Firstborn descendant of Clan DunBroch. And I'll be shooting for my own hand."
—Merida

cards.name: Card Advantage
cards.cardText:
If an opposing character was banished in a challenge this turn, draw 2 cards.

"I didn't plant the vine! It was the Nine, the Nine!"
—Three of Spades

cards.name: Touch the Sky
cards.cardText:
(A character with cost 2 or more can {E} to sing this song for free.)
Move a character of yours to a location for free. Then, draw cards equal to that location's {L}.

cards.name: Plunger Crossbow
cards.cardText:
SUCTION TECHNOLOGY {E}, 2 {I} — Draw a card, then choose and discard a card.

"All right, just let me adjust the trajectory."
—Gadget Hackwrench

cards.name: Syndrome's Remote
cards.cardText:
ZERO-POINT ENERGY {E}, 2 {I} — Chosen character can't challenge during their next turn.
LEARN FROM THEIR LOSSES Whenever a Robot character is banished, you may banish this item to discard your hand and draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Club Door
cards.cardText:
WELCOME BACK, SIR If you have a character named Fat Cat in play, you may play this card for free.
COOL CATS ONLY Your locations can't be challenged by characters with cost 2 or less.

cards.name: Fat Cat's Club - Seedy Headquarters
cards.cardText: The hottest club for only the coolest cats in town.

cards.name: The Island of Nomanisan - Syndrome's Headquarters
cards.cardText:
RESEARCH & DEVELOPMENT Robot characters get +1 {S} and +1 {W} while here.
CHEAP SHOT Once during your turn, whenever a character banishes another character in a challenge while here, you may deal 2 damage to chosen character.

cards.name: Woody - Waiting for a Friend
cards.cardText:
"Starin' over the jungle from this huge vine
I think back to when I was laughin' and feelin' fine
My friends were all around to welcome me back home
But now I'm lost in Lorcana and oh so alone"

cards.name: Rex - Protective Dinosaur
cards.cardText:
Bodyguard (This character may enter play exerted. An opposing character who challenges one of your characters must choose one with Bodyguard if able.)
RUN AWAY! During an opponent's turn, when this character is banished, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Isabela Madrigal - Such a Lovely Voice
cards.cardText:
Singer 5 (This character counts as cost 5 to sing songs.)
NEW MOTIF When you play this character, if you removed 1 or more damage from one of your characters this turn, gain 1 lore.

cards.name: Mirage - Super Recruiter
cards.cardText:
BUSINESS ARRANGEMENT When you play this character, if you have a Super or Hero character in play, you may draw a card.

"The Supers aren't gone, Mr. Incredible. You're still here. You can still do great things."

cards.name: Edna Mode - Fashion Designer
cards.cardText:
NO CAPES! When you play this character, you may return chosen item with cost 2 or less to its player's hand. If you do, its player draws a card.
MAKING SUPERS FABULOUS Whenever this character quests, your Super characters get +1 {L} this turn.

cards.name: Doc - Taking Notes
cards.cardText:
SHARE KNOWLEDGE When you play this character, if you have another Seven Dwarfs character or a Princess character in play, draw a card.

"Oh boy! Now this is a change grant... uh, a ranged pant... a strange plant!"

cards.name: Buzz Lightyear - Space Ranger
cards.cardText: "Environment appears habitable, but the flora seems to have undergone some strange mutations. Could be Zurg's influence."

cards.name: Donald Duck - Distracted Traveler
cards.cardText:
BURNING CURIOSITY Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, each opponent chooses and discards a card.

In the wilderness of Lorcana, a little luck goes a long way.

cards.name: Merida - Gifted Archer
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {I} (You may pay 3 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Merida.)
FIERCE PROTECTION While this character is exerted, whenever an opposing character challenges, you may deal 1 damage to the challenging character.

cards.name: Lyle Tiberius Rourke - Crystallized Commander
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} (You may pay 4 {I} to play this on top of one of your characters named Lyle Tiberius Rourke.)
PLAN'S CHANGED When you play this character, put the top 2 cards of your deck into your discard. Then, you may return an action card with cost 4 or less from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Mr. Incredible - Bob Parr
cards.cardText: Dropping weight and getting in shape!

cards.name: Daisy Duck - Trendy Traveler
cards.cardText:
BREAK IS OVER Whenever this character quests, if you played a character this turn, you may ready another chosen character. If you do, they can't quest for the rest of this turn.

"Time to go. I don't want to miss that sunset!"

cards.name: Kida - Guardian of the Path
cards.cardText:
NATURAL DEFENSE When you play this character, chosen opposing character gets -2 {S} this turn.

"I may be far from home, but I still know how to snare an intruder."
—Kida

cards.name: Bruno Madrigal - Oasis Oracle
cards.cardText:
FIND THAT VISION Once during your turn, whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, you may look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other on the bottom of your deck.
YOU'LL BE OKAY Whenever this character quests, you may remove all damage from chosen character.

cards.name: Minnie Mouse - Practical Traveler
cards.cardText:
DISCERNING EYE Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, gain 1 lore.

"I found a shortcut just over the ridge. We'll be at the oasis in no time!"

cards.name: Pocahontas - Steadfast Traveler
cards.cardText:
WANDERING SPIRIT Whenever this character quests, if you played another character this turn, return a location card from your discard to your hand.

"Sometimes the right path is not the easiest one."
—Grandmother Willow

cards.name: Incrediboy - Buddy Pine
cards.cardText:
NERDING OUT When you play this character, if a Hero character is in play, gain 1 lore.
SPOILER ALERT This character also counts as being named Syndrome for Shift.

"Not every superhero has powers, you know."

cards.name: Three Arrows
cards.cardText:
Deal 2 damage to chosen character. Then, you may deal 1 damage to another chosen character.

"I am Merida. Firstborn descendant of Clan DunBroch. And I'll be shooting for my own hand."
—Merida

cards.name: Jessie - Lively Cowgirl
cards.cardText:
PART OF A FAMILY Whenever this character quests, if you have 2 or more other Toy characters in play, you may draw a card.
YODEL-AY-HEE-HOO! Whenever you pay 2 {I} or less to play a card, chosen opposing character gets -1 {S} until the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Isabela Madrigal - Caring Cultivator
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I}
DO NO WRONG Whenever you remove damage from one of your characters, gain 1 lore for each 1 damage removed.

cards.name: You've Got a Friend in Me
cards.cardText: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. You may reveal up to 2 Toy character cards and put them into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

cards.name: Frozone - Super Cool
cards.cardText:
Rush
JUST CHILL When you play this character, if you have another Super character in play, you may exert chosen opposing character.

cards.name: Luisa Madrigal - Confident Climber
cards.cardText:
Shift 3 {I}
I CAN TAKE IT 1 {I} — Move up to 1 damage from chosen character of yours to this character. Then, if this character has 3 or more damage, move all damage from this character to chosen opposing character.

cards.name: DunBroch Family Tapestry
cards.cardText:
TORN APART This item enters play exerted.
MEND THE BOND {E}, Banish this item — Each player shuffles all character cards from their discard into their deck.

cards.name: Alien - True Believer
cards.cardText:
WE ARE ONE This character gets +1 {S} for each other Toy character you have in play.
HE HAS BEEN CHOSEN During your turn, when this character is banished, return another character card named Alien from your discard to your hand.

cards.name: Milo Thatch - Getting His Hands Dirty
cards.cardText:
Ward
SCHOLAR'S GAMBIT When you play this character, you may choose and discard a card to return chosen character to their player's hand.
PRACTICAL KNOWLEDGE At the end of your turn, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, draw a card.

cards.name: The Family Scattered
cards.cardText: Chosen opponent chooses 3 of their characters and returns one of those cards to their hand, puts one on the bottom of their deck, and puts one on the top of their deck.

cards.name: Jack-Jack Parr - Incredible Potential
cards.cardText:
WEIRD THINGS ARE HAPPENING At the start of your turn, you may put the top card of your deck into your discard. If its card type is:
• character, this character gets +2 {S} this turn.
• action or item, this character gets +2 {L} this turn.
• location, banish chosen character.

cards.name: The Leviathan - Guardian of Atlantis
cards.cardText: IT'S A MACHINE! When you play this character, if 2 or more cards were put into your discard this turn, you may banish any number of chosen opposing characters with total {S} 10 or less.

cards.name: Mr. Incredible - Super Strong
Zipper - Big Helper
cards.cardText:
Shift 2 {I}
BUZZING ENTHUSIASM Whenever this character quests, you may add his {W} to another chosen character's {S} this turn.

cards.name: Kida - Crystal Scion
What Else Can I Do?
cards.cardText: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. Put one into your hand and the other into your inkwell facedown and exerted. If a character sang this song, your characters gain Ward until the start of your next turn.

cards.name: Syndrome - Out for Revenge
cards.cardText:
Shift 4 {I} 
GOT ME MONOLOGUING! Whenever this character quests, return a Robot character card from your discard to your hand. Then, you may play or shift a Robot character with cost 8 or less for free.

cards.name: Mrs. Incredible - Determined Rescuer
Touch the Sky
cards.cardText: Move a character of yours to a location for free. Then, draw cards equal to that location's {L}.

cards.name: Buzz Lightyear - Jungle Ranger
Merida - Formidable Archer
cards.cardText:
FULL QUIVER When you play this character, you may return an action card named Three Arrows from your discard to your hand.
STEADY AIM Whenever one of your actions deals damage to an opposing character, deal 2 damage to that character.
